title: Questions from Quarantine: COVID-19 Post-Peak Governance
summary: The Security and Global Health Project is proud to present a weekly web series with Security Mom Juliette Kayyem and Medicine Mom Dr. Margaret Bourdeaux. Each week, our experts will answer your questions from quarantine and give you advice on staying sane and sanitary in a global crisis. We hope you'll join our Moms every Tuesday, and if you have a question that you want answered, tweet with #QuestionsFromQuarantine.
body: The Security and Global Health Project is proud to present a weekly web series with Security Mom Juliette Kayyem and Medicine Mom Dr. Margaret Bourdeaux. Each week, our experts will answer your questions from quarantine and give you advice on staying sane and sanitary in a global crisis. We hope you'll join our Moms every Tuesday, and if you have a question that you want answered, tweet with #QuestionsFromQuarantine . _list.source: Belfer Center for Science and International Affairs, Harvard Kennedy School

result.main_content_en: The Security and Global Health Project hosts a weekly web series featuring experts Juliette Kayyem and Dr. Margaret Bourdeaux, who address public questions submitted with the hashtag #QuestionsFromQuarantine. The series, titled 'Questions from Quarantine: COVID-19 Post-Peak Governance,' focuses on providing guidance for maintaining mental and physical well-being during the global crisis, with a specific emphasis on governance challenges after the pandemic's peak. It represents an initiative to disseminate expert advice directly to the public, leveraging social media for engagement. The content is part of a broader effort to discuss security and health policy intersections, as indicated by related expert analyses on topics such as mega-event safety and global supply chains.
result.main_content_zh: 安全与全球健康项目每周推出一个网络系列节目，由专家朱丽叶·凯耶姆和玛格丽特·布尔多博士主持。该系列名为“隔离期的问题：COVID-19峰值后治理”，旨在回答公众通过推特话题#QuestionsFromQuarantine提交的疑问，为全球危机期间保持身心健康提供建议，并特别关注疫情峰值后的治理挑战。这是一个通过社交媒体与公众互动、传播专家知识的倡议。该内容属于更广泛讨论安全与健康政策交叉议题的一部分，相关专家分析涉及大型活动安全规划、全球贸易供应链等主题。
